review_text: I purchased Ooh and Aah. I wasn't happy with one application, as it appeared there were only black glitter pieces here and there and I wanted more black so I applied it heavily. I had to wait a few min for it to dry b/c at first it got all over my lid when I thought I'd waited long enough. I wear contacts and sometimes touch my eyes too much, which is probably why this liner chipped off near the corners of my eyes---or maybe I applied too much. I noticed by the end of the night that my eyes were irritated, but I wasn't exactly sure if the glitter had actually gotten in them b/c I couldn't see anything. Sometimes a tear in my contact or dry / old contacts have the same effect. So I guess I'll say it's worth another shot, but be very precise while applying and allow enough time to try. All glitter liners including Urban Decay appear to get mixed reviews either they love it or hate it. But I myself have more trouble with liquid liners, so if you're a pro, this could be a good buy for you.

review_text: I first bought Mad Mad Love, and it's great. You can make it as subtle or as bold as you want. I wear this to work (I'm an office manager) fairly frequently because the brush lets me put on such a thin line that it just gives a little sparkle to my look. For the most part, this is a little bit of clear (maybe slightly pink) base with a LOT of glitter. Later on, I decided to purchase Drunk Dial. Not the same at all! This is mostly blue liquid (that stains my eyelids!) with a little glitter. I rarely use it. I'm not a MAC person, but after this disappointment, I broke down and bought MAC's "Peacocky" glitter liner...it's so much better and it's even $1 less!

review_text: First of all I'd like to stand and say that "I'm a TOTAL make-up Junkie"! ...it's true, I have every brand, color, name and kind known to man, a self-proclaimed expert on the subject, if I do say so myself! And I guess that's who matters, right? Me! I know how I want to look and this line makes it so easy to be me and dare to be, and do, what I want to! This eyeliner is terrific. As stated, it is a liquid so it goes on smooth, can be as thick or as thin as you like, it depends on how dramatic you want it, and washes off as easy as it goes on. The sparkle and shine is amazing! Also, there are many colors to choose from to suit your mood or need on any particular day or night. I would reccomend this product to anyone who loves to look and feel beautiful, loves make-up, or just wants to try something a little different from your everyday liner. This is an amazing product that comes in a nice sized container that will last quite a while for the price. I'd say pick one up...maybe two, you won't be disappointed!

review_text: Sooo gorgeous! I bought the drunk dial color yesterday and am exercising EXTREME self control to not buy the mad mad love and ooh & ahh. This looks lovely with absolutely NO other makeup. None. All the colors are splendid. I really would enjoy them all. I think I have my favorites though. They look nice together.

review_text: I'm 15 years old and female(Using my dad's amazon account.) I got Drunk Dial the day before yesterday, it took about 5 days to get here. I LOVE IT! I LOVE glitter, and I am VERY picky when it comes to make up. This doesn't hurt my eyes. I wear contacts, and I don't put it on the lash line inside the lid (it says not to do that on the directions on the back), so I don't know if that would hurt (most eyeliners hurt or dry out my contacts, especially liquid eyeliners with glitter.) If you don't use a lot, it brings a wonderful shine. And the more you apply, well the bluer and more glittery it gets (a thicker coat looks great at night and it's not too dark.) With that one review about it getting on the top lid as you blink, that was (as the review slightly touched on) probably because that person didn't let it dry. It's fast dry, it will get only a little on the top lid if you put a thick coat and blink right after. I usually put it on before drying my hair. It lasts all day, washes off completely and easily when you wash your face, it's easy to apply, applies as thin or thick as you want, and the look is amazing. This is my favorite eyeliner in every way (I have A LOT of eyeliner!) A couple notes on the color and size of the product: It's teal in tint (but not too much) it a very aqua color. The bottle is the size of a normal container of eyeliner, about 2 inches tall with a 1/4 inch radius. (It's enough to last me almost a year.) Also look at Urban Decay Heavy Metal Glitter Liner, it costs more and it burns my eyes, I could barely put it on. But it's more intense. I have sensitive skin and if you aren't sure or have sensitive skin as well I don't recommend it. But it maybe exactly what you're looking for! =^^= I hope this review helps!

review_text: So, I bought this in "Mad Mad Love" and the name is the only way to describe how I feel about it! I wear it on an almost everyday basis (to class, or work as an engineering intern) paired with neutral eyeshadow, and stick liners. Just use some light shadow, and line the top and botom lid like normal with a brown/blue/other neutral color, and then add a thin line of this stuff to the top lid and let it dry. It's a great daytime look, and you can go thicker/more layers for nighttime. If you want a color that will match anything you wear, go for the mad mad love. the pink is kind of muted, and the glitter is multi-colored.

review_text: After much research on causes and cures for canker sores (and be alert that whereas cold sores and fever blisters are the same thing, and caused by a virus - herpes simplex - canker sores are not viral and not contagious) after a third successive outbreak from last Autumn to late Winter, I was getting depressed and a bit desperate. Canker sores are slow to heal, and you will find what health remedies work best, but meanwhile what to do about the extreme pain? Usually KANKA pain relieving liquid is a favorite, but it, as most of these topical applications, does not heal, it just allows you to feel less crazy for a while. (Also, it stings initially.) So, as above, in a desperate moment, after reading that a doctor developed CANKER MELTS, and that it received good ratings, I purchased them. They are round "band aids" for direct application to the ulcer. It is important for adherence that that area of your tongue, mouth or cheek be as saliva free as possible, something that was difficult for me. The "Melt" is meant to adhere to the ulcer, giving it a little cover. It is soothing, and does have some substance that helps it adhere. Again, however, I failed the test; as soon as my tongue bumped against it, it moved, and wouldn't re-adhere. So, with proper application, it's nice. You may have better luck than I.

review_text: I've suffered with canker sore for years. I've learned some of my triggers, such as sodium lauryl sulfate (I switched to JASON toothpastes) and ibuprofen (Advil) makes them much worse. I've tried all of the over the counter treatments. Some of the other products help with the pain, but this is the only one I have found which TRULY shortens the course of the canker sores. Sometimes they are painful on application, if the sore has progressed too far, but the pain goes away pretty quickly, and soon becomes much less than it was before applying the disc. This isn't a problem if I catch the sore early. No matter how bad the sore, and I had some almost as big as the disc, they are either completely gone or nearly so within three days, without fail. I can't recommend Cankermelts enough. Please try them, as I'm sure you will be impressed. I also want everyone to know about these, so that they don't end up going off the market. I don't want to live without these little things!

review_text: I thought this would be a nice base for lip gloss and other products. It is, the lip paint appears smoother, my lips feel smoother, and all around happier with it. It's not a lip balm though, so my lips dry if I try to use it alone. My biggest complaint is it breaks. It has a slightly more buttery consistency than crayons, so to get any product on my lips, I had to use a bit of pressure. After a while of this, a big chunk simply broke off. Apparently the product just points from the bottom to the opening in the applicator,unsupported by the sides. If you can deal with the thick consistency and tendency to break, this is a great product.

review_text: When everyone was wearing clear or neutral glosses, I wasn't phased. I'm a red lipstick addict from way back, and I just toned down the red and added a little gloss to update it. Thank God, though, it looks like real, pure reds are making a comeback. I read about Besame's vintage cosmetics line, and as my MAC red was about gone, I figured I'd try one of their reds. My coloring is a brunette with a very fair complexion. Frankly, except for goth dark reds, I can wear pretty much any shade. I picked Besame Red since it seemed middle of the line in terms of color, and I wanted to get an idea how this cosmetics line worked. The first thing that surprised me is it comes on a card. This lipstick isn't cheap; you'd think the packaging would be a little nicer. (I get they're trying to do vintage cosmetics, but if you're going to make it look like Coty or Max Factor from the 40s, you probably don't want to charge a hefty price for it.) The other surprise is that the tube isn't heavy. Everyone raves about the metal container, but like so? It's lightweight. I've had some heavy lipstick containers from luxury lines that bragged about the lipstick containers being jewel-like, and they were. This container isn't. So now with my quibbles out of the way, let me say the lipstick itself is NICE. Some said the lipstick is small; it isn't. It seems about the size of most lipsticks with a double bevel to make putting it on easy. I always use a lipbrush (does away with lipliner and makes lipstick in the case last FOREVER. You'll get tired of the lipstick before it runs out.) The first surprise is the scent. I don't recall any lipstick except some glosses having a discernable scent. This one does, rather vanilla-y. It's pleasant. The lipstick texture in the tube is, surprisingly, moist. It goes on easily, but it's not so moisturizing that the color doesn't last. I put it on and did the old fashioned lip blotting with a piece of toilet paper. With a super slushy lipstick, this will almost take the entire thing off. Not so with Besame. The color is very saturated and stayed on my lips nicely. The lip blotting didn't get rid of the moisture. My lips still feel nice. The color lightened up a bit (which happens with blotting.) You're supposed to add another layer of lipstick after this, but I usually don't. The color was still very saturated, so there was no need for more. The staying power is excellent! It lasted all day, and my lips never dried out. If you love the color (and use a lipbrush), you'll get WAY more out of this true red to the point where you'll get tired of it before it runs out. I'm definitely going to be investigating more of the Besame line. N.B. One other trick that works if you want your lipstick to last into next week. Blot the first coat and put on a bit of powder with your finger - baby powder or compact powder does nicely. Blot again, and put on another coat of lipstick. It'll last through dinner and into next Christmas. :)

review_text: I've worn a LOT of red lipsticks in my lifetime, and I'm extremely picky. My past favorites have all across the board- MAC, Clinique, Chanel, Covregirl, Kat Von D, etc. Here's what I like about it. It's got wonderful intensity. I like BOLD. It stays clean around the edges. It wears evenly- meaning it doesn't just wear off and leave a line around the edges. It lasts long- I usually work 6 hours at work, and this stays on the whole time without re-touching, even through a few cups of coffee and a few snacks here and there. It stains a bit- but you can get it off at the end of the day with some oil and a washcloth. The packaging is lovely and I just dig it.

The finish is dewy/shiny and somewhat tacky or sticky. I don't think we would try any other shades of this foundation because the scent is not very pleasant and the finish was not what we prefer. The coverage was ok though. Not too heavy, but enough to even out skintone and give a nice uniform look.

product_title: All Natural Mineral Makeup, Eye Shadow, Blush Sample Kit (Dark Medium Shade) with 5 piece Black Brush Kit by IQ Natural by IQ Natural
product_description_filled: Product: All Natural Mineral Makeup, Eye Shadow, Blush Sample Kit (Dark Medium Shade) with 5 piece Black Brush Kit by IQ Natural by IQ Natural.

review_text: I'm somewhat fair skinned but went with Medium/Tan, glad I did. Especially with summer near. My first experience with loose minerals makeup. I like it so far. A few tips I've learned: I separated the products out into four small plastic bags - the 'foundation' in one bag; 'other powders - blush, 'bronzer,' white setting powder, and the bisque concealer (which is too dark for me); light eye shadows; darker eye shadows. This way I can easily find them in the order I want to use them. I decided to set each one on the counter before opening, and just turn the lid, rather than holding them up to open them in case I drop them (would lose the entire contents). I also just let the extra powder fall on the white vanity and clean it all up when I'm finished with a cloth and one spray of counter cleaner. (Works well so far!) I do have to let my moisturizer dry completely before applying the loose minerals, but no problem so far. Not sure how it may be in the heat of summer when my bathroom's warm though. Wondering about keeping my face completely dry in order to apply the powder.... I do like the way the make-up looks, feels, and lasts. I haven't had my face get wet, so not sure if it stays on well or would wash off in a mist.

review_text: This is such a good product I don't know where to start. I was reluctant to purchase these because I hate makeup and don't really know how to use it but this was perfect. I asked a lot of questions from owners before purchasing but I have to say I am very satisfied. This was a great price for as much as I got and I do plan on purchasing larger products in the future. This product came with instructions that made it very easy for me to apply the product. I picked the medium dark skin tone because my skin tone matched the models and it was a perfect choice. After applying it covered all of my dark acne spots and under eye circles but it looked like I was not wearing make up. My husband asked if I was wearing any and he said it looked like I wasn't but it looked like I was "clear and glowing" and that was exactly what I was going for. I am very allergic to just about any makeup that they sell in the store and this one did not make me break out and it did not feel like I was wearing anything at all. It also did NOT bleed onto my white uniform top and by the end of my 12 hour shift it was still there and didn't feel all yucky on my face. I am in love with this product.

review_text: I ordered Papavier and I am really enjoying the color and formula. I saw the color described as a purple elsewhere, but it's really a sheer deep raspberry with shimmer. It adds color to the lips, but it's subtle (which is exactly what I wanted). I really love the formula - it's about as un-sticky as a lip gloss can be. The feel on the lips reminds me of Clinique Superbalm, only in a tube with a brush - it feels like it has more of a vaseline type base, so it's moderately moisturizing and very comfortable to wear. The brush is different than any I have used before - it's fat and stubby, I believe it is supposed to mimic a make-up artist's pinkie finger. It's sort of strange at first, but definitely works well! I wish these were a little more reasonably priced, but the quality and color are excellent.

product_description: The Brand As one of the fastest growing brands on the high-street, Sleek MakeUP creates innovative, superior performance makeup, with strong pigmentation and high quality. Sleek MakeUP understands skin tone, catering from fair to dark and everyone in between, with products that aim to make the latest beauty trends truly accessible. This popular high-street brand, which is similar to what the states would refer to as a mall, department store, or shopping strip, creates truly trendy makeup for fashionable women. The Sleek Makeup I-Divine Eyeshadow is probably the product that caught every US beauty fan’s eye and created the Sleek Makeup fan base in the states. This Sleek Makeup eyeshadow palette contains 12 perfectly complimentary shades of Sleek Makeup eyeshadows that are designed to work together or on their own. There are currently 23 different Sleek Makeup I-Divine Eyeshadow Palettes available in versions that can help you create virtually any eye makeup look you desire. From Sleek Makeup palettes full of neutral tones to palettes packed with vibrant metallic colors, grab two or three and create your very own makeup kit. The two most popular Sleek Makeup I-Divine Eyeshadow Palettes are the Sleek Makeup All Night Long Palette which features warm smokey tones and the Sleek Makeup Oh So Special Palette which features soft pinks and browns.

review_text: Love this stuff! I got addicted to their eyeshadow palettes and own about 8 of them now, then decided to try their blushes and since have ordered three of them with the three colors inside with flame being the first. Well worth the money and the longevity is all day, till I wash my face. You'd be surprised what you can wear if blended well with the right amount of color.

review_text: As a blush fiend, I was extremely excited to get the sleek palettes. I was blown away by the pigmentation on all three shades. The blush pans are huge and I don't think anyone could hit pan on these. However, I did notice that the center and right shades, while pigmented, did not blend well into my skin. I have relatively dry skin, and the aforementioned shades just sat on my skin unlike my TheBalm or Nars blushes. However, I do really enjoy the bold color selection, and I see myself using this palette more in the fall. Would recommend if you love the shades!

review_summary: Natural looking lashes with no clumping
review_text: This mascara produces a nice, natural enhancement to your lashes with almost zero clumping. review_text: I have been using this for about two weeks now. First I curl my lashes really good and I bent the mascara wand into a curl formation. It gives my lashes a nice, noticeable look. product_description_filled: Product: Anastasia Beverly Hills - Concealer - 3.5. Brand: Anastasia Beverly Hills.

review_text: 15 Shades of Amazing Coverage The Anastasia Beverley Hills concealer not only has incredible coverage, but also comes in 15 different shades. I love this product because I was able to find a shade that matches my skin tone. I know a lot of people are skeptical about buying foundations and concealers online but this product offers multiple color charts and videos to help make-up lovers find the perfect shade that fits their coverage needs. I wear concealer almost every day under my eyes and the coverage that Anastasia concealer provides is amazing and last the entire day. For makeup fanatics like myself, one of the best elements of this concealer is that you don't need to use as much in one setting to get the coverage you seek. Although this product is more expensive compared to department store concealers, this concealer lasts longer and has multiple coverage uses. My good friend purchased the Anastasia concealer in a 2.5 shade and not only uses it to cover blemishes on her face but also tested its coverage ability on her tattoo and it worked amazingly. When she was done applying it to the portion of her arm where the tattoo was located, you could no longer see the tattoo. I have heard some users comment about the thickness of the Anastasia concealer and I do agree that this product is thicker compared to every day concealer. With that being said, this product was intended for maximum, long-lasting coverage and without the ability to cover this product would not be successful. As I mentioned before, I wear concealer on a daily basis and some days I wear it for different purposes. Some days I decide to go for a very basic look, other days you can see me with full smoky eye and all the other works. The reason this concealer is successful is because we can wear this product anywhere and know that it will last the entire day. If you deicide to try it out we can wear it to class, work, out on a hot day and sometimes if I am feeling lazy I even wear it to the gym and when I leave I can still count on its amazing coverage. The Anastasia concealer comes in 15 different shades and its coverage is not like any other product. If you have not tried this product I definitely recommend that you do.

review_text: I love these wet n wild Mega Last Lip color lipsticks. They have the staying power of a liquid long lasting lipstick with the creaminess of a stick. The quality of this equals that of luxury brand lipsticks. You can own this for what you would pay in tax for the luxury brand as well. It's also a perfect dupe for Kat Von D's Lolita. It's a rich nude wine color, but not a super a super dark wine color. I'm very fair with black hair, and those dark colors wash me out. This is a berry kissed neutral color. It's super pigmented and a perfect matte shade. This lipstick stays put without feathering. It doesn't last all day. I usually end up reapplying after lunch, and then before going out, which I don't mind. It's not drying like other long lasting lipsticks or liquids. It also blends well with lipsticks and lip glosses. Something other long lasting lipsticks can't do without flaking or getting that gritty texture. I have several shades in this line and have yet to find one that doesn't work for me. It's the perfect everyday lipstick and priced where you can buy one for your home, your purse, and your desk.

review_summary: Comfortable Full Coverage for Golden/Olive Skintones!
review_text: I love love LOVE this foundation! It's perfect for golden/yellow/olive skintones! I have very dry, combination, sensitive skin that is prone to breakouts, so I need a full coverage foundation that isn't going to draw attention to my blemishes, fine lines/wrinkles, and dry patches. I'm fair with golden olive undertones, because I avoid tanning, and most fair foundations make me look dry and ashy, especially if they're full coverage, but this foundation blended right into my skin and felt really healthy with a beautiful, dewy finish. The coverage is quite buildable without feeling cakey, and it stays flawless for hours on end when set with a loose powder and setting spray. I very highly recommend it!

I would recommed this color and be matte blush line to all looking for a great affordable blush.

review_text: It actually works! Excited to keep using this product! I noticed that in some stores, it's one of the first ones of the Hard Candy primers to sell out, so I'm really glad I found one of the last two they had at a Walmart by chance.

product_title: Sleek MakeUp i-Divine Eyeshadow Palette- Storm
product_description: The Brand As one of the fastest growing brands on the high-street, Sleek MakeUP creates innovative, superior performance makeup, with strong pigmentation and high quality. Sleek MakeUP understands skin tone, catering from fair to dark and everyone in between, with products that aim to make the latest beauty trends truly accessible. This popular high-street brand, which is similar to what the states would refer to as a mall, department store, or shopping strip, creates truly trendy makeup for fashionable women. Sleek Makeup prides itself on their high performing, top quality makeup that doesn’t sacrifice performance for price Each and every Sleek Makeup product is created with vibrant, skin tone matching, and skin flattering pigments that are designed for people of all skin types and ethnicities. The Sleek Makeup I-Divine Eyeshadow is probably the product that caught every US beauty fan’s eye and created the Sleek Makeup fan base in the states. This Sleek Makeup eyeshadow palette contains 12 perfectly complimentary shades of Sleek Makeup eyeshadows that are designed to work together or on their own. There are currently 23 different Sleek Makeup I-Divine Eyeshadow Palettes available in versions that can help you create virtually any eye makeup look you desire. From Sleek Makeup palettes full of neutral tones to palettes packed with vibrant metallic colors, grab two or three and create your very own makeup kit. The two most popular Sleek Makeup I-Divine Eyeshadow Palettes are the Sleek Makeup All Night Long Palette which features warm smokey tones and the Sleek Makeup Oh So Special Palette which features soft pinks and browns.

From Sleek Makeup palettes full of neutral tones to palettes packed with vibrant metallic colors, grab two or three and create your very own makeup kit. The two most popular Sleek Makeup I-Divine Eyeshadow Palettes are the Sleek Makeup All Night Long Palette which features warm smokey tones and the Sleek Makeup Oh So Special Palette which features soft pinks and browns.

review_text: I love this lip gloss! I have bought a few of them now to replace all my others. They go on so nice...not gritty or sticky at all. review_text: I think I've found my new favorite lip gloss! I purchased the Raspberry color, which is a nice, neutral pink. I have dark brown hair, brown eyes, with fair skin and this gloss brightens my look without appearing "makeup-y". It glides on very smoothly and feels like velvet, a nice matte finish. No stickiness or goopiness like so many other glosses I have tried, and it doesn't smell or taste like some fruit or candy - a definite plus. It isn't quite as dark as it appears in my picture, a bit softer in color when applied. You could use it over a darker color lipstick to tone it down a bit, but I like it just as it is, for a natural look. The case is a very pretty, slender design of metallic plastic. I am very happy to have found this, as I am trying to switch my makeup and beauty items to those that are more natural and organic. This fits the bill perfectly, as it is USDA certified organic, with ingredients of castor oil, coconut oil, grape seed oil, jojoba oil, beeswax, sunflower oil, kaolin, carnuba wax, cocoa butter, carrot powder, shea butter, lemon peel extract, rosemary leaf extract, and grapefruit seed extract. Oh, and it's made in the United States - Bonus!! Lotus Pure Organics has a winner with this one. I highly recommend this product. I find myself doing more and more of my shopping online these days, and always check the reviews on a product before making a purchase. In turn, I try to leave reviews on most of the things I buy in an effort to help others with their buying decisions. I received this product at a discount, or for free, in exchange for my honest and unbiased review.

The cream compact is too much moist surface area-seems like an easy place for bacteria to grow.

review_text: One of the best products I have found for filling in sparse eyebrows. I was having trouble finding it in the drug store, so I ordered it here.
product_title: 2 Pack Wet n Wild Beauty Ultimate Brow Kit 963 Ash Brown
product_description_filled: Product: 2 Pack Wet n Wild Beauty Ultimate Brow Kit 963 Ash Brown.

review_text: Very inexpensive.....goes on perfectly. Glide the brush in the wax...then in the color...I use the lighter color.....sweep it across your browline once or twice and you've got perfect, natural looking brows.
product_title: 2 Pack Wet n Wild Beauty Ultimate Brow Kit 963 Ash Brown
product_description_filled: Product: 2 Pack Wet n Wild Beauty Ultimate Brow Kit 963 Ash Brown.

review_summary: ... eyebrows for well over a year now and I love it! It comes with an eyebrow brush and ...
review_text: I've been using this set to do my eyebrows for well over a year now and I love it! It comes with an eyebrow brush and a pair of tweezers. I also purchased a small mascara brush to use with the eyebrow wax rather than using the provided brush for both the powder and the wax. Paired with a primer (I use Urban Decay Eye Shadow Primer) makes it last all day (sometimes even till the next day if I'm careful). That alone won't make it smudge proof, but if you also use The Pore-fessional - Agent Zero Shine by Benefit, this will help keep it smudge proof for a few hours, brushing on more to touch up through out the day will keep it smudge proof. I've tried some other products out, like WunderBrow (meant to last a few days and is supposed to be smudge-proof. Does not work as advertised, it smudged and didn't even last till the next day), as well as some eyebrow tinting products like Tint My Brows Gel (by Etude House, purchased here on Amazon. This one worked well, but the color I ordered wasn't right for me, and since it is imported, it takes a few weeks to arrive. That, and the fact that it dries up pretty quickly made for few uses from one container and overall not worth it to continue using. All in all, this product won out for me when compared to the other products and brands I've tried.

review_text: I love...it I have a scar on my right eyebrow and have some hair messing from that eyebrow so it covers it up to where u don't even notice I have a scar

review_summary: Have no fear, there's no smear, but use with a primer
review_text: I bought this for Xmas 2014 and it took me a year to figure out how to buy it again. It was only available at the time and that location. Thank you Amazon. I sweat alot and I do not fear wiping my forehead and smearing my brows. I do wear a primer which allows it to glide... since the color isn't exact for me, I mix in some eye shadow and it blends nicely with a different product. I bought 8 of them, because the brush is perfect, and I like the built in mirror, which I just found on the 2nd one, and never noticed it on the first one... also the mini tweezers are cute. I never use them, but you might. I have tried other brow kits, and this one is solid. Do use a primer otherwise it does not spread so easily.

review_summary: LONG lashes for a LOW price. Volume suffers a bit.
review_text: I love mascara and try as many brands as I can. I was actually sent a full sized tube of this Wet n Wild Mascara in a subscription beauty box from Walmart or Target or somewhere. I didn't bother to open it for a while because I am used to using Tarte, Lancome, and sometimes Maybelline and CoverGirl. Wet n Wild was never one I even really tried except a time or two. The other day I saw the package and decided to try it. I have thin straight lashes and like drama. I don't like natural looking lashes, I want LONG, dramatic ones. As this says it is a volumnizing mascara, I expected it to maybe give me some volume and I would use a second mascara for length. The tube is big and the opening is a bit TOO bit which allows a lot of mascara on the wand. I scrape the brush against the sides as I pull it out to avoid getting too much mascara on the brush and my lashes. To my surprise, rather than giving me volume, I got length and a lot of it. I got a bit of volume but nothing major . But the length! I got not clumps and no spidery looking lashes. The mascara didn't flake or smear and it lasted until I removed it. Since that day, I have been using Lash Out Loud MaxVolume Plus sometimes with a primer, sometimes with another mascara that gives me more volume but it's fine alone too. I get enough volume so that I don't look freakish with long skinny lashes and I get separation. My lashes wing out on the outside corners, something that "Cat Eye" mascara never did for me. I am quite happy with this inexpensive mascara. Shocked but happy. If I got a tad more volume, this would be AHHHHmazing. But as it is, if you like length, no clumps, and spending a few bucks rather than double digits for mascara, this is one to try. I will buy it another tube when I run out of the one I have.

review_text: 4.5 Stars Ugh this mascara is pretty much perfect except for one thing!! But first, let me explain the good. So, at $5 the new Lash Out Loud Max Volume Plus Mascara from Wet n Wild is super affordable. There is only one color, Amp'd Black, and it's a nice rich, dark, matte black. I like the conical, tapered brush with short, plastic bristles and I like that it's flexible. What I LOVE about this mascara is how LONG it made my lashes!! Being advertised as a volumizing mascara, I really wasn't expecting much length, but putting it on for the first time and seeing how much my lashes grew really wow'd me! I also really like that it doesn't smudge on my lower lashes resulting in raccoon eyes (the one by Wet n Wild Fergie in the gold tube did that which is a bummer because it has a gorgeous effect on my lashes). The volume it gives is pretty decent, but here is where my complaint comes in. This formula is WET! Having just finished using two drier formula mascaras and loving them, I wasn't prepared for the maintenance that a wet formula brings. While clumping was definitely not as bad as it could have been, my lashes still clumped a little, even after having wiped off excess product from the wand. I love adding coat after coat of mascara to my lashes, and this became increasingly difficult as more of my lashes started sticking together (something I never experienced with my two former products). I went through with an eyelash comb but I still wasn't satisfied with the result. I also lover layering different mascaras and this was a bit difficult to to do without encountering clumping. Also, my lashes felt a little stiff after the mascara dried. All in all, while the price, color, brush, non-smudging, and lengthening were fabulous, I'm not yet sold on the formula. I'm hoping that as it dries a little then it will look a little better once applied. In the meantime, I'll have to work on my application and see if I can get it to work for me without having to result to an eyelash comb. I still recommend trying this as it's so cheap, and those who like wetter formulas may actually enjoy this mascara more than I did. As for repurchasing, we'll see.

review_summary: Nowhere near as noticeable as I expected/was looking for
review_text: I ordered this glitter mascara so I can have fun with my look when I go out or on special occasions. When I received it, the product is actually white/transparent, not pink as the picture shows. That was a disappointment but I figured I would give it a try nonetheless. I applied some black mascara first as I have read many reviews that say that it is easier to see the sparkles if you do that. I spent 10 minutes applying the glitter mascara to try to get enough on my eye lashes so people could actually notice. After trying for 10 minutes, I finally gave up. You can apply enough that if the light hits just right, it will reflect off the glitter and will show SOME sparkly but someone would have to know that you are wearing this sparkly mascara in the first place in order to see it. In the end, I will keep it as my husband thinks it's cute, even though he is the only one to see it but I would not buy again, not only because you can't really notice it but also because it is not at all the color that is shown on the picture.

review_text: This is a great little powder brush! It has a good concentration of bristles for more even application, though I did have to trim a few of them that were sticking up higher than the rest. I did not notice much shedding in the application I was doing, which was applying my finishing powder. It did the job well -- it applied evenly and smoothly. The only thing I didn't like, as most other commenters said, is that I could not choose my color. I ended up getting orange, which is one of my least favorite colors. But as it's a brush and not an accessory, does the color really matter that much? Nah. For this price, it's a great brush, no matter which color I'd have gotten. Note: I received this product at a discount in exchange for my unbiased review.

The coverage is very good - I didn't need to apply it often and it lasted a couple of hours before I needed to reapply. I purchased color number 45 and it was slightly lighter than what was pictured. There's not quite as much pigment, so it goes on a little less opaque than some higher line products. Personally, I like that aspect better as most of the time I'll go for gloss over a lipstick. It does have a bit of a gloss finish - not as matte as most lipsticks, Again, I personal plus for me.

review_summary: Feels like silk on my lips
review_text: This little tiny box arrived in my mail box. Inside was a smaller box and inside that was my wee little jar of Bee Venom lip balm. No waste in the packaging, which is really important to me. (and unlike some shipments directly from Amazon!) The product smells amazing and feels like silk on my lips. Nothing sticky or goopy/thick like some other lip balms or glosses. I know you're supposed to use it before bed (and I did), but I like it so much I put it on first thing in the morning too. My lips stay soft all day long without reapplication. I haven't noticed any plumping action, but I like the product so much I am willing to give that a pass. It also doesn't sting like other lip plumping products do (I'm looking at you DuWop Lip Venom!) Highly recommended.

review_summary: You can wear this for days.
review_text: If you're looking for a lip product that really, truly only needs to be applied once a day, this is it. This is my second LipTint from LA Splash (The other was Bellatrix/Belladonna) and both of these have stayed on my lips through 48 hours of wear until I decided to remove them. They lasted through eating, drinking, talking, sleeping, showering, exercising, and just about any other task you can expect to do throughout a day. If you've never used an LA-Splash LipTint, the first thing you're going to say about them is that they're super drying. I've found that the drying effect is really what keeps this stuff attached to your lips until you decide to remove it. My best advice is to keep your lips in good condition before its use. When I do this, my lips don't get that cracked appearance people tend to complain about when using LA-Splash LipTints. They look more like the advertised picture. When I remove it, I do a lip scrub and put on a little more lip balm and my lips are as good as new. For the longevity you get out of this stuff, it's hard to complain. This would get a 5 star review, but the color Gigi itself is much darker than I thought it would be and isn't the vibrant pink you see in the picture. I should have checked Instagram for what it would realistically look like on a real life human before purchasing it. I still absolutely love the color and wear it regularly, but it isn't what I was looking for. If you've already looked up pictures of people wearing Gigi and you like how the color looks, this will be a 5 star product for you.

review_text: I decide to buy a good make up remover, and decided to buy this one even though there wasn't many reviews. Not even a video review on youtube, but I still decide to risk the chance buying it since this product look very promising. This was AMAZING, better than any other make up remover! This didn't leave my skin feeling dry after wiping the make up off, instead it leave my skin feeling nice and soft, and when I make a mistake on eyeliner, it doesn't leave a red mark when wiping so many times unless you wiped it very very hard. I also tested it on my hand, and did foundation, eyeliner, lipstick, mascara, etc and pour some make up remover on baby wipes, wiped it on my hand in one goal, and it almost 100% removes all the make up, like i'm IMPRESS! One thing I noticed, that this make up remover can run out very quickly, but no problem, this is a easy solution to save some money for awhile beside buying another bottle RIGHT away after it ran out!!! You can pour some water in the bottle, shake it and wala! You just got a free refill! The pictures I posted was when I refill my bottle a bit, when it was half way empty, and now it's full because I just added some more water, and what even more amazing that it still works amazing, wiping off the make up in like one goal, even after refilling it with water! I suggest this make up remover if you looking for something to save money, or something that doesn't irrates your skin, or something to wipe your make up in less than 10 tries! This is a amazing product and can't believe not many people in the US knows about this.

review_summary: Great product, though you need an extra few minutes to apply, some fibers may fall into your eye and irritate your eye.....
review_text: This mascara is good to use in the evening. You get longer and fuller lashes instantly and they don't stick together (no fly legs). The only reason I gave it 4 stars is bc it did give me some irritation when I applied it, it didn't work out great for me bc I wear contacts and I had to take my contacts out. the fibers fall while applying them, so you have to wipe them off your face and re-apply your make up. I stopped applying this in the mornings when I'm in a rush as it takes me more time to apply it then any other mascara, but it is definitely worth it and I would choose it over any other mascara have I have an extra 5 minutes to apply. The case is very cute and helpful if you like to take your mascara with you to re-apply later on. but it is totally not necessary as it holds up all day! review_summary: Can see a difference. Pleasantly surprised!!
review_text: I have always been leary about trying fiber lashes I've always seen other companies selling them for extremely high amounts and have also heard people say the fibers get into your eyes. When I came across these realized the original price was actually very reasonable and if I actually like these I can actually afford them. ( let me preface this by saying) I did get these at a discounted price for a honest unbiased review. The first time I used it I didn't quite follow the directions and did not do one eye at a time, they ended up a little bit clumpy. The next time I followed the directions and did one eye at a time and noticed a big difference ,my husband actually noticed my eyelashes were longer. I have no problem getting the mascara off ,I always use coconut oil as a makeup remover and it comes right off I've also used face wash and had no problems as well. It's pretty safe to say that you have made a new customer. Im glad I tried it out. Only suggestion I would have for anyone is to make sure you are quick when your are putting the masacara one

product_description_filled: Product: Au Naturale Vegan Organic Lipstick in Cora by Au Naturale.

review_text: i took a chance and ordered this lipstick on-line to give Au Naturale a try. I love the fact that it's vegan and organic. Although I have other natural lipsticks, (that is all I will wear as I don't want cruelty or chemicals) I could tell that this brand was high quality and pure. It feels very light and clean on my lips. The color is lighter than it looks on the stick but I read the reviews and as that came up a lot, I managed my expectations. It's more of a flat, dusty rose on which slightly enhances my natural lip color. What I really like is how it adds subtle color without making me look "made-up". I goes on a little dry so you may want to apply heavy or use this as a base layer with a gloss on top but as a natural look that lasts, it works fine alone and moistens up as its worn. Overall I'm happy with the product and will probably look in to trying some other shades. The best part it the fact that I can use my buying power to make conscious choices for myself,animals and the planet and look pretty too.
product_title: Au Naturale Vegan Organic Lipstick in Cora by Au Naturale
product_description_filled: Product: Au Naturale Vegan Organic Lipstick in Cora by Au Naturale.

review_summary: The color is very pretty. The tube is easy to open and close ...
review_text: If I wouldn't eat a product, I don't really want it on my lips on on my skin, so I was excited to try Au Naturale Vegan Organic Lipstick. The color is very pretty. The tube is easy to open and close and is very sturdy. The lipstick itself goes on with a bit of effort and seems to have a higher wax content than other lips sticks, but if you can get your lips warm it up, it goes on without too much fuss during the warmer months. It feels more like the stiffness of a lip liner. The lipstick has a bit of mineral shimmer to it, which is quite lovely. Since it isn't a buttery or oily lipstick, it doesn't budge, smudge, or feather out into the surrounding skin. I like this feature, because it eliminates the need for liner (unless I want to line in a different color for depth). The lipstick does have to be reapplied occasionally, especially after eating, because the pigments in the lipstick doesn't stain the lips. I plan to try other colors and products by Au Naturale.

I can make it work but next time I'm trying 02 brown.

review_summary: TASTE JUST LIKE THE REAL DRINKS !!
review_text: I am very happy with this purchase. The lip gloss has 6 different flavors, and I kid you not, they taste exactly like the real drinks. I have used the Root Beer gloss numerous times, and when I lick my lips, it's just like drinking a real root beer. This lip gloss lasts for a long time, and does not have to be re-applied frequently, which is great. I also love the tin box that they came in. I will give it to my son when I finished with it, since he's a Coca Cola collector. This is a real bargain, and I highly recommend.

review_summary: Organic, non-irritating, does bleed if rub on it
review_text: I love this. I had a severe allergic reaction to regular cosmetics and other cosmetics with toxins, preservatives, and fragrances. I found this brand on "Think Dirty". It's organic, goes on smoothly, and doesn't irritate my eyes even after wearing it an entire day. It does bleed if i accidently rub on it; I occasionally need to look in the mirror throughout the day and clean it up with my fingers or q-tip. Overall, it's a plus for me because it's organic, natural, and doesn't cause any irritation!

review_summary: Love it. the color and texture is great
review_text: I love it. The color is rich and is exactly what I was looking for, deep rich red, close to burgundy. Very attractive. I have not been wearing it for long so I don't know yet how many hours it will last but so far I love how it feels and looks. Some products make may lips dry and chapped, This does not feel heavy, or sticky on my lips nor drying. I like the texture. I will be ordering another one now. An update. This product DOES last. Maybe only the softer (smooth) inner part of the lips and the line where the upper and lower lips close together does not hold on to the color for long probably because of the wetness or natural movement of rubbing between the lip. I still love it. This is probably inevitable and goes for all types of stay on lipsticks. I like to shape my lips to look a little bit pouty so I apply it to the border of my lips from the outside (like a lip liner) and the inner border of lips to make it look bigger then use a lipstick brush to blend it leaving the borders darker and the inner part lighter to make it look fuller. I just need to reapply on that inner line to maintain a perfect look. If you don't want to or don't care to have this effect or look and already have big full lips then this may not even be an issue. I still don't regret purchasing another one. I just hope they don't discontinue it. I only wish it would be a bit cheaper.
product_title: Deep Red Liquid Matte Lipstick, Addiction - A Waterproof Lipstick That Does Not Smudge or Budge
product_description_filled: Product: Deep Red Liquid Matte Lipstick, Addiction - A Waterproof Lipstick That Does Not Smudge or Budge.

review_text: I bought several different "long wear" lipsticks in red in an attempt to find one that would actually stay on all night for a costume party. Others I purchased stayed until I ate or drank, then started to wear off and look odd. This one though...this stuff goes on and doesn't budge! A bit tricky to apply evenly, but once I got it on it covered nicely and looked great for HOURS. Eating...drinking...talking...you name it, it stayed on. I had to remove it with makeup remover when I got home. It doesn't dry out at all...stayed sort of tacky/sticky all night. Definitely not creamy smooth like regular lipstick, but not uncomfortable. And I'll take it for the longevity of wear! The tube color looked really dark when it arrived, and I wasn't sure it would be the right shade of classic red. But when I put it on, it was lighter and definitely what I'd consider that "bombshell red" color. Not coral in tone, I suspect it has some blue undertones and leans on the cooler red side of things. I don't normally wear bold colors like this but for this outfit and this occasion, it was exactly what I was seeking. Wish I had found it PRIOR to wasting all of my money on all those other brands...

review_text: I learned about this product from a Youtube video when I was searching for information on concealers that actually come in shades light enough for my Scandinavian/Irish skin. I'm so white that I automatically choose the fairest shade of concealers and foundations, only to discover that they're either too dark or too yellow. I bought a "fair-skin" highlight/contour product from Nyx to find that the highlight was essentially my skin shade... Thankfully, they have since released their HD concealer in a shade called Alabaster that is quite perfect. THIS STUFF. Is it white enough? Oh yes! It's actually TOO light to use as a concealer, so I use it as a highlighter and undereye concealer, which are ideally lighter than your foundation to create dimension in the center of your face. There's still a little too much yellow for my taste (as bad as it sounds to say, my skin is more grayish) but it's workable! Also, the coverage is insane! One teeny pinpoint of this stuff conceals one whole undereye area. They rightly advertise it for covering up tattoos!

product_title: Black Radiance Perfect Tone Lip Gloss Set 4-Piece Collection
product_description: This Black Radiance Perfect Tone Lip Gloss Set is the perfect collection for females who want to nourish their lips and add some color to make them pop and stand out. Plus, the delicate berry flavor keeps lips kissably delicious for hours on end. A lush collection of four, sheer color popping shades, this set allows you to match your taste, outfit or mood and will complement a vast array of skin tones. Each high-gloss color beautifully highlights your lips, while keeping them soft with long-lasting moisture throughout the day. Each lip gloss is easy to apply, boasting smooth even coverage that conditions and softens your lips so you can feel as great as you look. Made with aloe vera and grape seed extract, this lip gloss also provides antioxidant protection, nourishing your lips to furnish a youthful, radiant glow. Packaged and ready to give or receive, this 4-piece gift set is perfect for birthdays, holidays, anniversaries and graduations. It also makes a great grab bag gift or party favor for any special occasion. Of course, you can purchase it for yourself and enjoy the glossy shine and great taste whenever you see fit. Whether you're home or on the go, each tube is sized just right. You can easily slip the lip gloss into your purse or handbag so you always have it handy when you’re out and need a quick touch up or are craving that delicious berry flavor!With four lip gloss tubes in this set, you will have an ample supply to last for several months to come.

review_summary: My only complaint is that the colors I received look nothing like the picture
review_text: I would describe the texture as sticky or tacky or thick, which is my preference to thin lip glosses. My only complaint is that the colors I received look nothing like the picture. I got a reeeeally pale light pink called pink haze; a really bright pink called sunset mauve; another kind of frosty somewhat light pink called heated-rose; and a nude-ish matte skin-color called sultry pink. I was really looking forward to the redder colors pictured, and I don't like the sunset mauve on me at all. I am a bit disappointed about the colors being so different from the colors pictured.

review_text: I received my oval makeup brushes in the mail today. When I first lifted the package I felt how weightless it was and my immediate thought was "how gosh did I make a mistake..." I was expecting a little more weight to them, but that was not an issue at all. Now, when I opened the package I have to say that I was blown away! The brushes exceeded my expectations. I was definitely not expecting to love these brushes as much as I do! I want to buy more as gifts for friends and family! These are truly amazing and at a truly amazing price as well! I cannot wait to use them!! I would just like to point out that in one of the photos, I included a close up of brush 8 which seems to have a few scratches from what I'm assuming was the paint job, but it's only a minor thing and that will in no way affect the use of the brushes nor will it make me dislike them for it. these brushes are AMAZING!!!

review_summary: Amazing set for many makeup looks.
review_text: I had wanted to test out oval makeup brushes as I had been seeing them all over youtube and liked the finish it provided, though I did not know if it would work for me I still give it a shot and I am so glad I did ' This set comes with 10 brushes for various makeup uses, I have tried to incorporate all into my routine for some days but I do admit that I keep going to same 2-3 brushes over and over again. I like the fact that there are so many brush choices we can pick a brush that suits our face shape more. I usually go to the 3rd and 4th brush from the left (bigger then the small ones) to apply my foundation, and use it in circular motion to blend it all into my skin. Then go to a smaller size to apply concealer. I have also tried the smaller brushes for some eye looks which came out nicely. I also like the fact that I can use one of the brush for lipstick application and it actually comes out good. As a set it is great as the biggest brush can also be used to apply moisturizer and it'll blend into skin perfectly. I am really happy and these are my go to for my makeup application and one of these brushes have took the place of beauty blender in my life. These brushes are also very easy to clean using soap and water and get back to looking like new after they are dry. They also have a very nice plastic grip and a gold accent on top which makes them look very elegant. I am attaching some pictures as well as a picture from later in the day with my full look. Really happy with this set and definitely recommend it to others. I received this product free or at a discount in exchange for my honest & unbiased review. All views presented above are my own and in no way influenced by anyone else.

I'm so glad I did purchase these. I had the opportunity to purchase this set of straps at a slightly reduced cost in return for an honest review.
